parameters.pythonCode:
import base64
import io
from pypdf import PdfReader, PdfWriter
from reportlab.pdfgen import canvas
from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4
from reportlab.lib.colors import Color

item = _input.first().json

# Decodificar PDF base64
pdf_bytes = base64.b64decode(item['arquivo_base64'])

# Dados do cliente
nome = item.get('nome', '')
email = item.get('email', '')
telefone = item.get('whatsapp', '')
marca_texto = f'Receita enviada por: {nome} | E-mail: {email} | WhatsApp: {telefone}'

# Criar rodape com marca dagua
packet = io.BytesIO()
can = canvas.Canvas(packet, pagesize=A4)
width, height = A4

# Fundo amarelo no rodape
can.setFillColor(Color(1, 1, 0, alpha=0.5))
can.rect(0, 0, width, 25, fill=True, stroke=False)

# Texto do rodape
can.setFillColor(Color(0, 0, 0, alpha=1))
can.setFont('Helvetica', 8)
can.drawCentredString(width/2, 8, marca_texto)
can.save()

packet.seek(0)
watermark_pdf = PdfReader(packet)

# Aplicar em todas as paginas
reader = PdfReader(io.BytesIO(pdf_bytes))
writer = PdfWriter()

for page in reader.pages:
    page.merge_page(watermark_pdf.pages[0])
    writer.add_page(page)

# Exportar PDF final
output = io.BytesIO()
writer.write(output)
output.seek(0)

pdf_final_base64 = base64.b64encode(output.read()).decode('utf-8')

return [{
    'json': {
        'nome': nome,
        'email': email,
        'whatsapp': telefone
    },
    'binary': {
        'data': {
            'data': pdf_final_base64,
            'mimeType': 'application/pdf',
            'fileName': f'receita_{nome.replace(" ", "_")}.pdf'
        }
    }
}]

parameters.subject: =📄 Nova Receita - {{ $json.nome }}
